blended.narrative: Bromont is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
